coreJobStatement: Deliver accredited higher education programs and credentials to enrolled students within a safe, legally compliant, and research-capable campus environment
hierarchy: Process VN only (L7 → L4). No Product BOM — output is an educational outcome and credential.

l6Systems.name: Admissions & Enrollment
l6Systems.jobFamily: Recruit and matriculate qualified applicants into accredited degree programs

l6Systems.name: Academic Instruction & Curriculum Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Deliver accredited coursework and degree-program learning to enrolled students

l6Systems.name: Research & Scholarship
l6Systems.jobFamily: Generate, validate, and disseminate new knowledge funded by grants and institutional resources

l6Systems.name: Student Support & Campus Life
l6Systems.jobFamily: Sustain student retention, wellbeing, and social development throughout enrollment

l6Systems.name: Assessment, Credentialing & Graduation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Evaluate academic performance and confer accredited degrees, certificates, and credentials

l6Systems.name: Campus Safety, Security & Emergency Management (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Protect all occupants and property across all campus operations while maintaining regulatory-compliant evacuation readiness at all times

l6Systems.name: Facilities & Physical Plant Management (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain all campus buildings and infrastructure to code and operational readiness

l6Systems.name: IT & Digital Infrastructure (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide reliable network, device, software, and data infrastructure for all core steps

l6Systems.name: Administrative, Finance & Compliance (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Ensure legal, accreditation, financial, and HR compliance across all university operations

vnUnits.name: Admissions CRM & Application Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages prospective student pipeline from inquiry through enrollment decision. Integrates with Common App, coalition platforms, and institutional portals.

vnUnits.name: Student Information System (SIS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Central record of all enrolled students: academic standing, grades, financial aid, holds, registration. Required for federal IPEDS reporting.

vnUnits.name: Learning Management System (LMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hosts course content, assignments, discussions, and grading. Core instructional infrastructure post-pandemic.

vnUnits.name: Classroom AV & Active Learning Technology
vnUnits.functionalJob: Interactive displays, projection, lecture capture, and distributed audio for face-to-face and hybrid instruction.

vnUnits.name: Laboratory Equipment & Research Infrastructure (Teaching Labs)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Discipline-specific bench equipment used in undergraduate and graduate teaching laboratories.

vnUnits.name: Research Lab & Instrumentation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Major equipment used in funded research programs. Vendor landscape is highly discipline-specific.

vnUnits.name: Research Administration & Compliance Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages grant lifecycle, IRB/IACUC protocols, export controls, and sponsored programs accounting.

vnUnits.name: Residence Life & Housing Management
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manages student housing assignments, contracts, maintenance requests, and residential programming.

vnUnits.name: Campus Health & Counseling System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Electronic health records for student health services and counseling center case management.

vnUnits.name: Degree Audit & Academic Progress System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Validates credit completion against degree requirements and generates graduation eligibility confirmation.

vnUnits.name: Exam Integrity & Assessment Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Proctoring (remote and in-person), high-stakes assessment delivery, and academic integrity enforcement.

vnUnits.name: Campus Access Control System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Electronic and mechanical credential-based access management for buildings, labs, and restricted zones across the full campus.

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Alarm Guards — **Türwächter Entry Point**
vnUnits.functionalJob: Surface-mounted mechanical guard devices that prevent unauthorized use of emergency exit doors while maintaining EN 179 / EN 1125 single-motion escape capability and (in IoT variants) broadcasting door-open and alarm events to centralized campus monitoring. Installed on existing door handles — no structural modification required.

vnUnits.name: Video Surveillance & CCTV
vnUnits.functionalJob: IP camera networks providing continuous visual monitoring of campus perimeter, building entries, parking, and interior common areas. Integrated with Video Management Software (VMS) for recording, search, and AI-based analytics.

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Smoke, heat, and CO detection network with voice evacuation capability. Required by NFPA 72 and NFPA 101 for all educational occupancies. Triggers automatic door unlock on activated exits (overrides any access control hold).

vnUnits.name: Mass Notification & Emergency Communication System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Multi-channel emergency alerting — Clery Act mandates timely warning to the campus community. Channels: text/email, outdoor siren, desktop alert, digital signage, PA, social media.

vnUnits.name: Physical Security Management Platform (PSIM / GSOC)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Unified software integrating access control, surveillance, fire alarm, and emergency communication event feeds into a single campus security operations view.

vnUnits.name: Building Management System (BMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Centralized HVAC, electrical, and building automation control. In larger universities, the BMS is also the integration hub for fire alarm and access control event feeds.

vnUnits.name: Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Work order management, preventive maintenance scheduling, and asset lifecycle tracking for all campus buildings and infrastructure.

vnUnits.name: Campus Network Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Wired and wireless LAN/WAN for all campus buildings. Backbone for access control, surveillance, BMS, and all instructional technologies.

vnUnits.name: Identity & Access Management (IAM)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Central directory and credential management for all students, staff, and faculty. Federated with physical access control credentialing.
